import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    let elem = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= elem
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, elem)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < nums.len()
    let n = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, n)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < sorted.len()
    let n = match sorted.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      output = "#{n}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{n}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(output)
  Ok(())
end
